sprint: Traveller Privacy — Clear My Projects on a Genuinely New Traveller Session
task: "another change if the system has identified its a traveller than all the caches should be cleared. traveller should not see projects of previous creators." Investigated the real gap before implementing: CreatorProjectStore ("My Projects") uses one flat localStorage key (vihustudio-projects) with zero scoping by identity -- on a shared device, an unclaimed Traveller's own story really does stay visible to whoever opens the browser next, since MagicCard.list().length===0 (the Traveller Gateway path) is true for both a brand-new device and a previous, still-unclaimed Traveller session. Confirmed the scope directly with the user before touching anything, given the destructive/hard-to-reverse nature of clearing data: (1) timing -- "the cache clean should only be requested when its entry sequence" -- only on a genuinely NEW browser session, never on an in-page reload of an in-progress story; (2) scope -- My Projects list only, not the current session slot or companion state. Implemented via a new sessionStorage marker, GATEWAY_SESSION_MARKER ('vihu-gateway-session-entered') -- sessionStorage starts empty in every new tab/window but survives an in-page reload within the same one, exactly matching the required signal. js/gatewaySequence.js's begin() now checks this marker immediately after computing isReturning: on a genuinely new session (marker absent) where the Traveller path was chosen (not Returning Creator), it calls a new CreatorProjectStore.clearAll() (added to js/creatorProjectStore.js, wiping the vihustudio-projects key outright) before anything else happens; the marker is then set unconditionally (both paths) so the rest of that tab session, including a Returning Creator boot, is correctly treated as 'already entered.' Verified via a new 5-scenario Playwright suite: a genuinely new Traveller session with a stale previous-Traveller project seeded in localStorage gets it wiped to an empty list, with zero console errors; a same-tab-session reload of an in-progress Traveller project is confirmed to NOT be cleared; a Returning Creator boot (a real Magic Card seeded) never clears My Projects under any circumstance. The existing 15-assertion Traveller/Returning-Creator pipeline suite, the completion/tap-to-skip sanity checks, and both goldenBuild.js suites all pass unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/gatewaySequence.js and js/creatorProjectStore.js, no CSS touched, so no cache-bust bump was needed.
